name: io.github.echolonius/token-intel
title: Solana Token Intelligence
description: Solana token due-diligence for AI agents: fused safety + market read (authorities, holder concentration, dev holdings, organic score, two-source liquidity cross-check) with a 0-100 risk verdict. Free demo tool; paid tool settles $0.02 USDC on Base or Solana via x402 — no API key, no account.
